PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Dedicated Psychology and Biology student with a passion for understanding the complexities

of  human behavior, health, and the factors that influence lives. Extensive experience in HIV

research, clinical care, and public health has fostered a strong commitment to making a

meaningful impact in underserved communities. Eager to further develop research skills and

contribute to advancements in epidemiology, focusing on addressing health disparities and

promoting wellness. Proactive learner driven by a desire to translate academic knowledge into

practical solutions that enhance community health outcomes.

coach_notes: To build a strong healthcare career, prioritize developing patient care and vital signs skills, as they are foundational for most clinical roles. You can gain these through volunteer work at clinics, shadowing healthcare professionals, or taking a Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA) course. Your existing clinical experience and analytical thinking will give you a solid head start—keep building on that momentum!

jobs.title: NY Children's Health Promotion Intern (Unpaid)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Excellent match with education, engagement, community service, and advocacy skills. Internship aligns with health promotion and analytical thinking.
jobs.gaps: Unpaid position may require financial planning. No specific children's health experience, but transferable skills are strong.

jobs.title: Case Manager
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong fit with case management: organization, advocacy, communication, community service, and client advocacy. Analytical skills support assessment and planning.
jobs.gaps: No direct case management experience listed. May need to highlight transferable skills from other roles.

jobs.title: Contractor - Community Health & Civics Worker (Bilingual Dari or Pashto)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Strong alignment with community health, advocacy, education, and engagement skills. Experience in epidemiology and culture supports understanding of community health needs.
jobs.gaps: Requires bilingual Dari or Pashto proficiency, which is not listed. No direct civics worker experience mentioned.

jobs.title: Mobile Response Peer Support Specialist
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Skills in communication, team collaboration, advocacy, and community service are relevant. Analytical thinking and initiative support crisis response.
jobs.gaps: No peer support specialist or mobile response experience. Lacks specific crisis intervention training or certification.

jobs.title: RN Staff Nurse I (Part-time) - Clinical Translational Research Unit
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Laboratory and analytical skills are relevant to clinical research. Communication and team collaboration support nursing environment.
jobs.gaps: No nursing license or RN experience. Lacks clinical skills, patient care experience, and research unit familiarity.
